summary: Step-by-step USCIS tutorial PSA walking through the five steps to register under the Alien Registration Requirement: create a my.uscis.gov account, file Form G-325R, await review, attend a biometrics appointment, and download proof. Visuals are explicit numbered step cards over a laptop, a USCIS.gov screenshot, a woman entering an Application Support Center, and gloved hands taking fingerprints, all under voiceover. Purely an instructional walkthrough with no music or genre styling, so out of scope.
notable_text: with USCIS, follow these steps; STEP 1 uscis.gov/file-online/how-to-create-a-uscis-online-account; STEP 3 and let you know; STEP 4 a biometric services fee; Application Support Center; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
